fields.question: What is the maximum capacity for an event?
fields.answer: Our venues can accommodate up to 500 guests. For larger events, please contact our sales team.

fields.question: Do you provide catering services?
fields.answer: Yes, we offer a variety of catering options, including vegetarian, vegan, and gluten-free menus.

fields.question: Can I book a venue for a private party?
fields.answer: Yes, our venues are available for private parties. Please visit the 'Venues' page to book.

fields.question: What is the minimum booking duration?
fields.answer: The minimum booking duration is 4 hours. For shorter events, please contact our support team.

fields.question: Do you provide audio-visual equipment?
fields.answer: Yes, we provide audio-visual equipment, including microphones, projectors, and speakers.

fields.question: Can I book a photographer for my event?
fields.answer: Yes, we offer professional photography services. Please contact our event planners for details.

fields.question: What is your privacy policy?
fields.answer: We take your privacy seriously. Please read our privacy policy on our website for more details.

fields.question: How do I get to the event venue?
fields.answer: You can find directions to the venue on our website or contact support for assistance.

fields.question: Is parking available at the venue?
fields.answer: Yes, we provide free parking for all guests. Please check the venue details for parking instructions.

fields.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
fields.answer: Outside food and drinks are not allowed. We offer a variety of catering options for your event.

fields.question: What is the dress code for the event?
fields.answer: The dress code is formal. Please check the event details for specific requirements.

fields.question: Can I invite additional guests after booking?
fields.answer: Yes, you can add guests up to 3 days before the event. Please contact support for assistance.

fields.question: How far in advance should I book my event?
fields.answer: We recommend booking at least 3-6 months in advance for best venue availability. For last-minute events, contact our team for possibilities.

fields.question: Do you handle marriage license paperwork?
fields.answer: While we don't process legal documents, we can recommend local authorities and help coordinate timing with your ceremony.

fields.question: Can I bring my own decorations?
fields.answer: Yes, but all decorations must be approved by our safety team 2 weeks prior to the event. No open flames or permanent alterations allowed.

fields.question: What's your alcohol policy?
fields.answer: We require licensed bartenders for all alcohol service. Last call is 30 minutes before event end time. ID checks are mandatory.

fields.question: Do you provide ADA-compliant facilities?
fields.answer: All our venues have wheelchair access, ADA restrooms, and assistive listening systems. Please notify us of any special needs during booking.

fields.question: Can I host a hybrid virtual/in-person event?
fields.answer: Yes! We offer live streaming packages with professional camera crews and virtual event platforms.

fields.question: What's included in your cleanup service?
fields.answer: Our full cleanup includes trash removal, floor cleaning, and returning the venue to its original state. Special cleaning needs available upon request.

fields.question: Do you provide event insurance?
fields.answer: We offer optional event insurance starting at $150, covering cancellation, property damage, and liability up to $1 million.

fields.question: Can I store items at the venue overnight?
fields.answer: Secure storage is available for $50/night. All items must be pre-approved and properly labeled.

fields.question: What's your bad weather contingency plan?
fields.answer: All outdoor events include a complimentary weather backup space. Decisions must be made 48 hours prior.

fields.question: Do you provide translation services?
fields.answer: We offer professional translation services for 25+ languages at $75/hour. Request during booking.

fields.question: Can I bring my pet to the event?
fields.answer: Service animals only. Emotional support animals require prior approval and documentation.

fields.question: What's your COVID-19 safety policy?
fields.answer: We follow local health guidelines - currently optional masking and available rapid testing stations upon request.

fields.question: Do you offer military discounts?
fields.answer: Yes! Active/retired military receive 15% off venue rentals. Valid ID required.

fields.question: Can I use confetti or glitter?
fields.answer: Biodegradable confetti allowed with $250 cleanup deposit. Glitter and sparkles prohibited.

fields.question: What's your cancellation policy?
fields.answer: Full refund 60+ days out, 50% refund 30-59 days out, no refund within 29 days. Insurance recommended.

fields.question: Do you provide childcare services?
fields.answer: We partner with licensed childcare providers at $25/hour per child. Advance notice required.

fields.question: Can I host a fundraising event?
fields.answer: Absolutely! We offer special rates for registered non-profits. Provide 501(c)(3) documentation.

fields.question: What's your capacity for standing receptions?
fields.answer: Our spaces can accommodate 300-700 guests for standing cocktail-style events depending on venue.

fields.question: Do you have charging stations?
fields.answer: Yes, we provide mobile device charging stations throughout all venues at no extra cost.

fields.question: Can I bring outside vendors?
fields.answer: Yes, but all vendors must provide proof of insurance and be approved by our team 30 days prior.

fields.question: What's your policy on smoking?
fields.answer: Smoking/vaping is only allowed in designated outdoor areas. $500 fine for violations.

fields.question: Do you provide transportation services?
fields.answer: We can arrange shuttle buses, luxury cars, or valet services starting at $500.

fields.question: What's included in your premium package?
fields.answer: Premium includes dedicated planner, premium linens, upgraded menu, and 3 hours of photography.

fields.question: Can I tour the venue beforehand?
fields.answer: Yes! Schedule tours M-F 10am-4pm. Evening/Saturday tours available for $150.
